chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.2436 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For order on office objection at A 2.For hg of bail appln 13.11.2024. Mr. Haji Younus, advocate for applicant. Mr. Saleem Akhtar Buriro, Addl. Prosecutor General, Sindh. After arguing at some length, learned counsel for applicant does not press this bail application and seeks direction to the trial Court to expedite the trial and conclude it within a reasonable time as all the witnesses are police officials. This proposal has not been opposed by learned Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh. Accordingly, this bail application is dismissed, however, the trial Court is directed to examine material witnesses within a period of two months, after which, in any case, applicant would be at liberty to move a fresh bail application before the same Court which shall be decided on its own merits. The bail application is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE HANIF
